entry.title: Re: Billing Document Posted in Current year, Accounting D...
entry.content:
Please share the document flow screen shot from the respective sales order and also screen shot from the Accounting Document

With standard configuration, this will not happen and seems, some custom logic is not working as expected.

entry.title: Re: Does Recruitment support auto-delegation of workflows?
entry.content: Thanks, that clarifies! It is limited but it is at least something. We'll explore further in test in our UAT, e.g. can we tie the autodelegation for the first level manager to next manager to take place after first level managers has been off for x numbers of days off and not immediately when first level manager is off.

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error in SAP Build Work Zone: Seeking Resolution
entry.content: @preeti_anandkar @madhav15 you can try enabling SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication in your SAP Build Work Zone. Go to your Work Zone's Site Manager - Settings > Identity Authentication tab > tick the checkbox to consent on switch, and click the Enable button to confirm.

entry.title: Difference between Substitution and Supersession in S/4 and FIORI
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

After reading many posts about Substitution and Supersession différences, i didn't understand.

Up to now I knew:
- Substitutions in ECC managed with Tcode VB12
- Interchangeability groups managed in APO with Tcode /INCMD/UI

I see that S/4 still refers to VB12 but added the concept of Supersessions in FIORI.

Please clarify the pros and cons for using one or the other.

Thank you.

entry.title: #SITCPS2025 O Fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a Chegada do TaaS: Tudo o Que Você Precisa Saber
entry.content:
Palestrante: Fabio Dezan

Título da palestra: O fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a chegada do TaaS

Descrição oficial: A apresentação abordará o fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a introdução do Tax Engine (TaaS), com uma demonstração prática das diferenças entre a TAXBRA e o Cálculo Externo de Impostos.

Quem é Fabio Dezan?

Fabio Dezan é consultor SAP MM com especialização em S/4HANA e Tax Engine (TaaS). Com uma carreira sólida e vasta experiência prática, ele é referência quando o assunto é transformação fiscal dentro do ecossistema SAP no Brasil.

Palestra técnica, prática e inspiradora. A apresentação mistura conteúdo técnico avançado com uma narrativa pessoal inspiradora, mostrando sua trajetória profissional e como eventos da comunidade SAP moldaram sua carreira.

O que muda com a chegada do TaaS? A palestra é um verdadeiro mapa para entender como a SAP está substituindo a antiga lógica baseada em TAXBRA e RVA BR por um modelo mais eficiente, conectado e moderno: o TaaS (Tax as a Service). O cálculo de impostos sempre foi feito pela fórmula 320, e agora será feito pela nova fórmula 279, com o apoio de motores externos homologados, como Sovos, Valara e outros.

Menos complexidade, mais precisão com o TaaS, o SAP passa a se conectar diretamente a motores fiscais externos usando arquivos JSON padronizados, e o cálculo acontece fora do sistema. Isso simplifica drasticamente o processo, elimina a necessidade de múltiplas regras manuais e traz clareza e agilidade à apuração tributária.

Técnicas práticas e exemplos reais. Inclusive comparações lado a lado entre o modelo antigo e o novo, demonstrando como o novo motor de cálculo reduz o número de IVAs, simplifica a pricing e permite maior controle e rastreabilidade sobre os dados fiscais.

Durante a sessão, o público faz perguntas cruciais, como o impacto do TaaS nas exceções fiscais e como se dará a manutenção das regras. Fabio esclarece que agora os parceiros são responsáveis por manter as regras atualizadas, e que a empresa pode cadastrar exceções diretamente no motor de cálculo, sem sobrecarregar o SAP.

Se você atua com SAP MM, SD, FI ou é consultor técnico, esta palestra é essencial. Além de trazer uma visão detalhada da transição para o TaaS, ela oferece insights valiosos para quem já trabalha ou vai trabalhar com o novo modelo.

entry.title: Re: Shipment text user exit during VT01N
entry.content:
May I ask what your actual question is?

Do you want to knwo what is the best/correct way to save the test in your custom table?

Or do you want to know how to implement the save mechanic? If so use google for "sap implicit vs explicit enhancements" and watch some yt videos which explain the difference and how to implement them.

entry.title: Re: DMO with System Move - the use case to change PAS host during DMO
entry.content:
Hi all,
we are just about to test DMO with System move to move AppServer to new host. We followed the instructions and setup a new ASCS and PAS on the new host. PAS installation so called  stub installtion descibed in DMO Guide. We want to exp/import in parallel and SUM manages rsync since it is SWPM 2.0 SP22. BEfore downtime we had to copy SUM dir to target and start SUM on target in parallel. But in the target System os authentication to SUM does not work. We have no running SAP PAS instance and empty HANA DB. So we dont' have an running as on it.

any ideas why SUM doesn not start. error mesage is "OS aúthentication failed"

entry.title: Need API to Fetch Customer Hierarchies in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and I need to programmatically retrieve Customer Hierarchies (e.g., parent-child relationships between sold-to, payer, bill-to, ship-to partners, etc.). After reviewing the available APIs in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, I have not found an OData or SOAP API that explicitly supports fetching customer hierarchies or customer master relationship data.

I have already explored the following:

  • Business Partner APIs (API_BUSINESS_PARTNER)

  • Available CDS Views and Communication Scenarios

None of these seem to expose the full customer hierarchy data as required for our use case.

My questions:

  1. Is there an existing standard API or communication scenario in S/4HANA Public Cloud that supports retrieving customer hierarchies?

  2. If not available as a standard API, is there a released CDS View or extension point that can be used via a custom communication scenario?

  3. Are there recommended approaches or best practices for handling this requirement in a public cloud environment, given the extensibility restrictions?

Any guidance or references would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Could you let me know why this issue happened?

Thank you.

Retest the process in debug mode and see from where the price is fetched in DP91. Most probably, it would be due to some custom logic written wrongly

entry.title: Re: Configure a Logo for your Cloud Application
entry.content:
Hello @proyaas,

I am also interested in putting our company's logo on SAP Cloud ALM Page. I cannot find the tile "Manage Launchpad Settings". Would you please advise me where to find it or how to upload the logo some other way? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Custom Accrual condition not being reversed
entry.content:
Hello,

If you want ZREP to be internal only and not contribute to the net value of the rebate, you should mark it as statistical. According to your configuration, ZREP is technically not an accrual condition type, but a rebate condition type. If you want ZRER to offset ZREP, you should use configuration activity Define and configure condition type groups for offset preceding settlements. Once you define a condition type group for this purpose however, you need to also add the standard rebate condition type RES1 and its offset RES2 to this group, because in the settlement settings for condition contracts you can either specify a single offset condition type, or a group of condition types. Defining condition type groups for offset preceding settlements is a bit tricky. You need to do as follows:

Condition Type | Condition type Offset Preceding Settlements

RES1 | RES2

RES2 | RES2

ZREP | ZRER

ZRER | ZRER

 

Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD access on BTP Free trial account
entry.content: Hi Raj Priya, Thanks. I was facing the same issue. It worked for me.

entry.title: Posting only possible in periods 2025/12 and 2025/11 in company code 5000 Message No. M7053 - SAP MM

I checked in MMRV and it is not in current period like April,2025, showing directly Nov,2025 & Dec,2025 as shown below in the screenshot. I even checked in MMPV/ OB52/OBY6/OMSY/MMPI everywhere the settings are right.

Material Ledger is also in activate mode.

MMRV

Tried the all possible ways, but not resolve the issue yet. It has to come current period April,2025. Can anyone please help on this.

entry.title: AI use for reading existing SAP documentation to find the needed config solution
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

Pls could you advise AI tool which could search in existing SAP experts blogs, OSS notes and other documentation and help to  find correct answer to questions?

 

Example: #Dispute management documentation has over 1000 pages. But I have only some few hours to find answer to question:@How often dispute case comes do collection specialist work list and where to configure the frequency? 

I would like to ask the above question to #AI tool , which can search in OSS and other SAP documents.

 

Thank you

Best regards

Marcela

entry.title: Re: Material Ledger closing - Use different account of CO...
entry.content:
Hi guys,

but what if I want to use another account but want to keep the CO assignment?

The revaluation shall use different accounts than the original COGS splitt did to see in the accounts the actual COGS-adjustment coming from actual costin run.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in S...
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

if you execute the trace without aggregation you can see the relationship in the call hierarchy:

The DB FETCH Operations are children of the FETCH Operation.
In my case the FETCH Operation took 22249 µs and the DB Fetch Operations 21743 µs (19294 µs + 2449 µs).
I think the difference is different measurement points and code path lengths since 1 FECTH Operation contains multiple DB FETCH Operations.
SAT:

 

ADT:

 

Why we can not switch off Database-level operations is a different question that i can't answer at the moment.
I'll check if i can find an answer. (In ST12 you can switch it off 😉 )

Kind regards,

Hermann

entry.title: Granting End User Access to a Specific Analytical Model in SAP DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi All

i have a requirement in SAP DataSphere,  I would like to grant access to a particular Analytical Model from a specific Space to a specific user, but not provide access to other models or objects in the same space.

As far as I know, Data Access Control does not support object-level access restriction. Also, creating a separate space for each model is not a feasible option for us, as we have many such scenarios

Appreciate any guidance or best practices you can share

entry.title: Quick Start Guides on SAP Cloud Solutions for Faculties and Students
entry.content:
SAP University Alliances Team has developed Quick Start Guides on different SAP Solutions. Each Guide is an initial engaging quick intro to the SAP Cloud Solutions. All Guides have the same look and feel, structure and are based on free resources.

All Guides received the feedback from:

  • SAP University Alliances reviewers
  • SAP experts
  • Faculties
  • Students

List of the Guides:

    • SAP and Quantum Computing (New)
    • SAP Business AI (New)
    • Low Code No Code development with SAP Build
    • SAP Sustainability Solutions
    • ERPsim: A Simulation Game for S/4HANA 
    • SAP Business Technology Platform: Introduction
    • SAP Analytics Cloud
    • SAP Integrated Business Planning
    • SAP Datasphere
    • Human Capital Management with SAP SuccessFactors
    • Enterprise Resource Planning with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
    • Business Process Management with SAP Signavio

Please try the Guides and share the Guides with your academic contacts.

Kind regards,
Nedim YILMAZ

entry.title: Automating Sales Orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud via API
entry.content:
In this post, you’ll learn how to automate sales order creation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud by integrating an external system using the standard Sales Order API—covering activation, publishing, and basic API testing for seamless, error-free order processing.

Implementation Steps

  1. Activate API in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:
    • Use the Communication Management app to set up a communication arrangement for the Sales Order API.
  2. Develop Integration Logic:
    • Use middleware to transform e-commerce data into the API’s required format.
  3. Test Integration:
    • Validate API calls using tools like Postman before deploying them into production.

Activate API in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

Procedure for API activation via the Communication Arrangement app:

  • Before you begin, identify the appropriate API for your requirements by navigating to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. From the homepage, select SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, then browse or search for the relevant API under the available categories.
         

  • Click on API, select All, and search for Sales Order.

          

 

  • Select the Sales Order API. 

         

  • Copy the Communication Scenario ID for later use.
         
  • Open the Communication Arrangements app from the SAP Launchpad.

         

  • Click New and enter the copied communication scenario ID, then click Create.

                

         

  • Assign the communication system that will send order details, then click Save to publish the API. 

       

          

        

  • By activating the API and clicking save, you enable the following operations.

        

  • Copy the Service URL/Service Interface.

        

  • Verify the service by pasting the URL into a browser.

        

 Develop Integration Logic:

  • Use middleware to transform e-commerce data into the API’s required format.

Test Integration:

  • Open Postman and select your client workspace.

       

  • Click Add Request.

        

  • Paste the Service URL, set authentication to Basic Auth, and enter the username and password from the communication system setup.

        

  • Use URI options to test API calls.
    Example: Add /A_SalesOrder to the URL to fetch sales order data.

        

NOTE: A communication system is required to complete the above steps. Please see the link below.

Activating the API 

Conclusion:

Automating sales order creation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud via an external system using the standard Sales Order API delivers significant benefits for mid-sized retail companies. By activating and publishing this standard API, organizations can seamlessly integrate their e-commerce platforms with SAP S/4HANA, eliminating manual data transfers that often lead to delays and errors. The process not only streamlines order management but also enhances data accuracy and operational efficiency.

Furthermore, SAP S/4HANA Cloud’s automation capabilities, including AI-powered features like sales order auto-completion and machine learning-driven data extraction, further reduce manual intervention and accelerate order processing. These innovations help sales teams focus on higher-value activities, improve customer satisfaction, and lower operational costs.

Testing and securing the API using API keys ensures only authorized applications can access your sales order data, adding an essential layer of security to your integration process. By leveraging these tools and best practices, businesses can achieve a robust, scalable, and future-ready order management solution within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Please feel free to share your thoughts in the comments section below.

If you enjoyed reading this blog post and would like to receive similar content in the future, please consider following my profile. By following my profile @gaddamarunkumar , you will receive updates on new blog posts and other content related to ABAP development best practices.

Follow the SAP BTP ABAP environment Topic page: SAP BTP

This page is a great resource for staying up-to-date on the latest news and developments in the SAP ABAP environment. You can follow the page to receive updates, post and answer questions, and read other posts on the topic

entry.title: Re: DRC e-Cockpit Add a New Button
entry.content: Hi! Have you found the solution ?

entry.title: Re: TS Supply Optimizer - Demand Fulfillment Rate calcula...
entry.content:
Hello Luca,

the optimizer also gets demands from not selected subnetworks that are connected to the current selection. These subnetwork demands are also passed as independent/location demands to the optimizer and are therefore included in the location demand fulfillment rate. Hope this explains the differences in your numbers.
You can see all demands that have been passed to the optimizer in the planning run monitor.

Best regards, Carsten

entry.title: Re: Mass Data Management Support For Job Info
entry.content:
Hi @NehaMV13 ,

Any information if this should work for Event Reasons with "Position Reclassification"? I tried it out at a customer and it allows me to select the event reason, change the Job Classification and Save/Submit, but they get stuck on status "Processing":

I did get a very generic "This scheduled job failed to complete" email about it:

But the status remains on "Processing".

When I use the same change on a different Event Reason, one without Position Reclassification, it does seem to work just nicely.

I couldn't find anything about this in the release notes or implementation guide, whether it is supported or not, hence me asking here first.

Thanks in advance.

Kr,

Bram

entry.title: Introducing the New Project Creation Wizard within SAP Build Lobby
entry.content:
Introduction:

We are pleased to announce the launch of an enhanced Project Creation Wizard in the SAP Build Lobby, designed to accelerate and streamline your project initiation processes. This new tool reflects our commitment to incorporating user feedback and optimizing your interaction with SAP Build. 

Background: 

To better understand user needs, we conducted extensive research involving interviews with a diverse group of users.  

A common theme in user feedback highlighted the need for a more intuitive project creation flow, starting with the user's objective before progressing to tool selection. Users expressed interest in new capabilities directly accessible from the Lobby, such as Node.js Full Stack and Java Full Stack options. 

Different Project Creation Options

Our findings guided us in redesigning the project creation process to align with user preferences and streamline the initial steps. 

What’s New? 

  • Intent-Based Navigation: The redesigned Project Creation experience prioritizes the user's goals and required tasks. Relevant project types are grouped logically to facilitate easier and faster selection, ensuring intuitive project management. 
  • Consistent Experience: In line with Fiori UX guidelines, we offer a seamless and consistent experience across the Project Creation Wizard and Extensibility Wizard. This step-by-step approach provides clarity and guidance, helping users make informed choices regarding their unique scenarios. 
  • Modern Look & Feel: Project creation options are categorized by Objectives, Categories, and Types, assisting developers in locating the right tools promptly. This organization allows for future expansion with additional capabilities. 

Next Steps: 

We value your input and invite you to share your experience with the new Project Creation Wizard. Your feedback is crucial for continued improvement. Use the "Share Product Feedback" option and click the "Give Feedback" button to let us know how this updated experience supports your professional objectives. 

Feedback

 

For more information, please visit SAP Help Documentation. 

We look forward to enhancing your project creation journey with SAP Build and ensuring our tools meet your business needs effectively. 

Already tried it? Please feel free to share your thoughts also in the comments below!

entry.title: Re: Posting only possible in periods 2025/12 and 2025/11...
entry.content:
Questions:

  • Does it happen in a productive system,
  • Is material ledger activated,
  • Can you display table changes on MARV or V_001_MARV with SCU3,
  • Did someone use MMPV (RMMMPERI), MMRV (SAPMM03Y) or OMSY (SAPL0MM2).

Read carefully KBA 2042164 - MMPV Period shifted by error to future period for Material Ledger active plant (transaction MMPI or report RMMMINIT )

entry.title: Tax Depreciation Key Calculation for Malaysia - initial and annual allowance
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to calculate Tax Depreciation for Malaysia with reference to the Capital Allowance i.e. Initial & Annual allowances separately. The scenario is as below:

For Asset Class e.g.: Purchased Software Initial Allowance is 20% and Annual Allowance is 80%

That means depreciation will be calculated @20% on the acquisition value immediately upon acquisition for one time. Again depreciation @80% per annum will be calculated on the acquisition value for the balance year.

Example: Asset is capitalized at MYR 10,000 on 1.8.2024

First Initial Depreciation would be: 20% on 10000= 2000 in Aug 2024

Annual Depreciation for 2024 would be: 80% on 10000= 8000 and this will be in the same year end.

Depreciation Method is SLM

Can you please suggest how to create a depreciation key in SAP for this. For the same year using Multilevel method system calculates only the initial allowance of 20% is getting calculated. 

Early response will be helpful and appreciated.

Regards,

Radhika

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS/IS upgrade from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03
entry.content: Thank you for the detailed steps on the versions and installation procedure. I have a similar configuration with SUSE 12.3 and SAP DS 4.2 SP14 with Oracle 19c for CMS in my current installation. I wanted to upgrade to SAP DS 4.3 but SAP DS 4.3 is not compatible with SUSE 12.3. I have to do a completely new installation. Our new test and production servers are already installed with SUSE 15.5 version of OS. When I check PAM for compatible versions PAM does not show SUSE 15.5, it has SUSE 15.2, 3, 4, and 6 but not 5. Should I go ahead and install the versions that are compatible with SAP DS 4.3 SP3 Patch 6 or should I ask my OS to be upgraded to 15.6?

entry.title: purchasing view data master data

I would know is there any possibility of comparing master data between two company codes as we are using public cloud I am not aware how can it be comparable. kindly suggest me any leads would be appreciated.

scenario :

we have 2 company codes wanted to test the purchasing view for both company codes in materials to compare and harmonize same for both company codes.

entry.title: Journal Voucher Posting Error in Postman – Invalid TaxGroup Value
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,

Good afternoon.

I’m trying to post a journal voucher using Postman, but I keep receiving an error. Below is the JSON payload I used and the error message I received.

JSON Payload:

{
"ReferenceDate": "2025-04-14",
"DueDate": "2025-04-14",
"TaxDate": "2025-04-14",
"Memo": "JE - Subsidy & Travel",
"JournalEntryLines": [
{
"AccountCode": "607403",
"Debit": 100.00,
"Credit": 0,
"LineMemo": "Subsidy UK",
"TaxGroup": "I1"
},
{
"AccountCode": "607400",
"Debit": 200.00,
"Credit": 0,
"LineMemo": "Travelling UK",
"TaxGroup": "I1"
},
{
"AccountCode": "115418",
"Debit": 360,
"Credit": 360,
"LineMemo": "LuLu"
}
]
}

Error Message:

{
"error": {
"code": -5002,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "10000415 - Linked value I1 does not exist"
}
}
}

It looks like the error might be related to the TaxGroup value "I1". Could you please check if this value is valid or help me understand what's going wrong?

Thanks for your support.

Best regards,

Urvish

entry.title: Re: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoic...
entry.content:
How old is your system, a similar error was corrected in 2019 ?

  • 2849574 - Billing documents can be saved several times

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 is now available.

To access the final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access it.

Note that the user assistance content is now available in 39 languages. You can benefit from real-time machine translations through SAP Translation Hub. Use the language menu to select your preferred language on the SAP Help Portal.

For you as a customer, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: Suppliers shouldn't be able to enter negative values...
entry.content:
I'm only specialized on the FI side and ECC/S4 hana cloud public version for this topic but I've done some researches on the web and found something talking about "Custom Validation Rules".

Is it something you have heard of ?

entry.title: Re: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoic...
entry.content: S4HANA ON PREMISE 1909 ABAP PLATFORM 1909 SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 1909 SAP FIORI FOR S4HANA 1909

entry.title: Re: Russia bank account number validations
entry.content:
If you don't find a standard solution, you could create your own check FM (*), activate it in FIBF on P&S BTE 00003000 'Bank Details Check Routine: Alternative '

(*) copy of SAMPLE_INTERFACE_00003000 or of FI_CHECK_BANK_ACCOUNT_RU

entry.title: WB2_REFERENCE_DOCUMENTS
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project that requires the implementation of custom logic using the BAdIs WB2R_DOCUMENT_CREATE and WB2_REFERENCE_DOCUMENTS. However, I have been unable to find detailed information or documentation about these specific BAdIs.

Could anyone provide insights or share documentation on the following points?

  1. WB2R_DOCUMENT_CREATE:

    • Purpose and typical use cases
    • Implementation examples
    • Any specific prerequisites or considerations

  2. WB2_REFERENCE_DOCUMENTS:

    • Purpose and typical use cases
    • Implementation examples
    • Any specific prerequisites or considerations

Any help or pointers to relevant resources would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Display an error message in a Fiori application triggered from a user exit
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I have a question. I have a validation process that needs to raise an error message in both VA02 and the Manage Sales Orders Fiori app.
When I perform the validation in the MV45AFZZ user exit, it works fine in VA02 and also prevents the process from continuing in the Fiori app. However, the actual error message text is not displayed in the app — instead, a generic message appears.

Can anyone tell me if there's a way to work around this?
Or is it possible to send the custom message to the Fiori app from the exit?

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
It is great to hear about your adventure. You may want to meet some of the SAP Community leaders as well as you build your community network. Wishing you continued success!

SAP Community Leaders Finder | SAP Community

Also, you may consider be a community event organizer! Become an Event Organizer | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Mispunch Issue in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
You mean to say that you are not able to fetch the unpaired punch via API?

You can use GET TimeEvents API to fetch all the punches, irrespective of whether they are paired or not. Missed punches are subject to regularisations, so that employee can put in a manual punch request.

 

BR,

Raihan

entry.title: Re: Shipment text user exit during VT01N
entry.content: No I don't want how save mechanism work and I know implicit and explicit enhancement. I just wanted to know how to get the text information during shipment creation. I know object id of the text,but we can't use FM READ_TEXT as during creation it's in process and not committed

entry.title: Re: Solution Quotation in SAP S/4HANA Service 1909OP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I've followed all the configuration steps mentioned above, but unfortunately, SAP still doesn't generate any follow-up documents from the Solution Quotation in my case — and I'm a bit stuck.

Has anyone experienced something similar or might have an idea what else could be causing this?

Best regards,

Kevin

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Fantastic!

Make sure that you are the lookout for Sapphire registration! (coming soon!)

entry.title: Route does not convert to visit sap C4C CRM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please suggest me for SAP C4C CRM, Business user Create a Route, but route not convert to Visit, this issue face in all business users' All Deployment changes comment but Visit not Genrate.

Best Regards,

Deepak Yadav

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors Learning : 1H 2025
entry.content:
It's really disappointing that SAP have still not addressed the fact that it takes hours/days for single items to show in the "Enhanced Search". 

Proxy in ILX only works if the user you're proxying as is toggled into the new ILX - because of the gaps and the inconsistent library timing we are still not able to commit to turning off legacy. that makes the proxy feature still not great as you can't pick which view you see.

entry.title: Re: Account determination error in MIGO
entry.content:
Make sure that you have defined GL accounts for each transaction per chart of accounts (e.g. INT7), transaction/posting key (e.g. GBB) and, if required, for each valuation area, general modification and valuation class (not for DIF, for example).

  • Read more at the available blogs and KBA in the forum and support.

entry.title: The New Extensibility Model from the S/4HANA Sales Perspective
entry.content:
Extensibility in SAP S/4Hana follows a new model, often referred to as "Clean Core Extensibility." The new approach is outlined in the guide Extend SAP S/4HANA in the cloud and on premise with ABAP based extensions . The model is built on three main pillars - Key user extensibility, Developer extensibility, and Side-by-Side extensibility.

Source: sap.com

In this blog, I would like to focus on the new extensibility model from the S/4HANA Sales perspective (formerly known as the Sales & Distribution module) and compare new functionalities with the "classic" enhancement options well known from previous SAP releases.

The comparison goes beyond what is currently classified as extensibility by SAP, as some functions are now delivered out of the box in S/4HANA (for example, flexible workflows, flexible document numbering, etc.). However, in previous SAP versions, these were typically delivered as enhancements or WRICEF objects. Therefore, they are included here to provide a broader picture of the functionalities in S/4HANA that can reduce the need for enhancements and system modifications.

In this article, I aimed to include the most important and commonly used functionalities from the SD perspective. Naturally, it does not cover all features, whether from the classic or new extensibility perspectives.

Table 1 provides a mapping between classic and new extensibility solutions, along with additional comments on the advantages and/or limitations of the new tools. To improve readability, the content has been divided into different application areas.

Table 1: Classic vs New Extensibility in S/4Hana Sales (based on S/4Hana 2023 release).

Application areaClassic extensibilityNew extensibilityComments (new extensibility)

Data model and UI extensibility

Several enhancements necessary:

  • Manual table appends (VBAK / VBAP / VBRK / VBRP / LIKP / LIPS, etc.),
  • Manual screen modifications,
  • User exits for PBO and PAI modules.

Custom Fields functionality.

Business context available:

  • Sales: Sales document
  • Sales: Sales document item
  • Sales: Billing document
  • Sales: Billing document item
  • Shipping: Delivery
  • Shipping: Delivery item
  • Sales: Customer Material

Easy to use, smoothly integrated with other functionalities such as reporting, output management, API / BAPI extensions etc.

No ABAP coding required.

Sales documents approvalCustom workflows or user exits to block sales documents, request and process approvals.

Flexible Workflows for sales documents:

  • Workflow for sales order
  • Workflow for sales contract
  • Workflow for sales quotation
  • Workflow for credit memo requests

Delivered out of the box. Easy to customize in Fiori apps, without technical knowledge about the workflow technology.

Custom logic during sales documents processing

User-exists (includes MV45AFZ*, MV50AFZ*, RV60AFZ*, etc.), classic BADIs, enhancement points, and implicit enhancements.

Custom Logic functionality (so called Cloud BADIs), mainly:

  • SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_BUSINESS
  • SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_BUSINESS
  • SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM
  • LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD
  • LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM 

 

Only restricted ABAP language (ABAP for Key users) available in the app "Custom Logic".

Technically, BADIs from the "Custom logic" app can be  implemented in a classic way using SE19 transaction. 

Classic user exits are still available in S/4Hana On-premise and Private Cloud, but they are not considered as "clean core" solutions. 

Data validation in sales documents

User-exists in include MV45AFZZ / MV60AFZB / RV60AFZZ, mainly:

  • USEREXIT_CHECK_VBAK
  • USEREXIT_CHECK_VBAP
  • USEREXIT_CHECK_VBEP
  • USEREXIT_CHECK_VBKD

Custom Logic functionality (BADIs):

  • SD_SLS_CHECK_HEAD
  • SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE
  • SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM
  • SD_SLS_CHECK_DELETE_ITEM

 

The same as in the point above. 
Data transfer between documents (for custom fields)

Data transfer routines (VOFM) assigned in the copy control settings.

Business Scenarios in the Custom Fields application, for example:

  • Sales Document to Billing Document on Header Level,
  • Delivery to Billing Document on Header Level,
  • Many more scenarios available.

No ABAP coding required. 

Custom fields are automatically created in related objects when the business scenario is activated. 

Field Catalog for Pricing - extensions with custom fields

Manual appends to structures KOMKAZ and KOMPAZ + user exits implementation (USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMK and USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMP)

Custom Fields application. 

Business context:

  • Sales: Pricing Communication Head
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Item
Seamlessly integrated with custom fields on header / item level of sales documents by activating relevant business scenarios. 
Field Catalog for Revenue Account Determination - extensions with custom fields

Manual appends to structures KOMKCV and KOMPCV + user exits implementation (USEREXIT_ACCOUNT_PREP_KOMKCV and USEREXIT_ACCOUNT_PREP_KOMPCV)

Custom fields application.

Business context:

  • Sales: Account Determination Header
  • Sales: Account Determination Item
Seamlessly integrated with custom fields on header / item level of sales documents by activating relevant business scenarios. 
Number range determination for sales and billing documents

Custom tables to store number ranges assignment based on predefined conditions + user exits implementation (USEREXIT_NUMBER_RANGE / USEREXIT_NUMBER_RANGE_INV_DATE)

Standard, configurable functionality, delivered out of the box:

Flexible billing document numbering

Flexible sales document numbering 

Configurable number ranges without ABAP coding (coding possible with dedicated BADIs if more complex logic is required). 

Enhancements for the SD-FI integration in billing process

Enhancements SDVFX001 - SDVFX011.

Partially covered by the Flexible Billing Document Posting functionality, within the scope:

  • Baseline date determination, 
  • Reference number determination, 
  • Accounting document type determination, 
  • Negative posting indicator,
  • Posting block set.

Only a small part of the SD-FI integration enhancements is currently covered.

Conclusion:

SAP S/4HANA offers a wide range of functionalities that simplify the implementation of customer enhancements and reduce the need for system modifications. Some of these features - especially Custom Fields, Flexible Workflows, and Flexible Document Numbering - significantly streamline the implementation.

In the on-premise and private cloud editions, classic extensibility options are still available, though they are not recommended from a clean-core perspective. However, this does not mean they can no longer be used. They still play an important role, particularly in custom logic scenarios where cloud BADIs remain limited in terms of functional coverage.

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning with Datasphere & SAC: Seamless Planning in the Cloud?
entry.content: With Seamless Planning, is it possible that the Datasphere tables to be virtual tables mapped to on-prem SAP system ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign Intercompany Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi 

Our customer has the IC process in place and has been used already for a while. They would like to change that when the IC SO is created (from the PO) the status would be "In preparation" rather than "Open".

Is there something in the scoping question or on the activity list where I can change this behaviour?

thanks!

entry.title: How Digital Tools Transformed Business
entry.content:
1
Customers today want personalized sportswear — fast.
Logos, colors, fit — fully custom.
Traditional systems couldn't keep up.

2
We built a 3D configurator that lets users design gear online in real-time.
No back-and-forth. No designer needed.

3
The key? We connected the configurator to our ERP backend.
Each design becomes a production-ready order.
No delays, no manual input.

4
The results for XaviSport:
✔️ Faster lead times
✔️ Fewer errors
✔️ Scalable across Europe & beyond
✔️ Higher customer satisfaction

5
Digital tools helped xavisport move from traditional workflows smart, scalable customization — and that’s the future of sportswear.

entry.title: Re: Tables for Object Relationship Service links between...
entry.content:
Hello,

1- enter the QM note key in the SRRELROLES table (OBJKEY field, requires leading zeros, search from the QMEL table, if necessary)
- ROLEID field contains the GUID;

2- enter the GUID in the SMZB_BINREL table (e.g. KYdMdZO47j{Bpk9N2T1Pim)
- ROLE_B field contains the relationship between the GUIDs

3- enter the referenced GUID in the SRRELROLES table (SMZB_BINREL-ROLE_B field)
- OBJKEY field contains the related note number

-> Another option is the Function Module NREL_GET_NEIGHBOURHOOD.
Fill Import parameters with:
IS_OBJECT-OBJKEY = Your QN Doc. no. (e.g. 000200001160) NB, you have to use leading zeros.
IS_OBJECT-OBJTYPE = BUS2078
I_DEPTH = 05 (this is how deep you want to go in the document flow.)
Run the FM and you’ll get two tables in the result. Look in table LINKS and use some ABAP logic to get the documents that you need. Here you find the documents with the roles they have: VORGAENGER/NACHFOLGE and REFERENZ/REFERENT. Compare with the document flow picture in QM03 and you’ll figure out the logic needed.

Good luck! Cheers

entry.title: Re: DP91 price are taked from KE26 instead of VK13 condit...
entry.content: Have you assigned a DIP profile (defined in ODP1)?

entry.title: Business Partner as leading object in ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on a preproject for and S/4HANA conversion and in doing so we need to activate the CVI.

As you probably know usually the BP will only get activated technically as it is a prerequisite for the conversion and the customer/supplier remain the leading object while still on ECC.

My client now requests to use the Business Partner as the leading object on ECC already, but I cannot find any documentation on that, nor do I have any experience with it.

Does anyone of you know if it is even possible to make use of the Business Partner as Customer/Supplier before going to S/4HANA and what the consequences would this have on the ECC system?

Hope you can help me out with this, thanks in advance.

 

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Apps that will be deprecated by 2508 release
entry.content: Is the old solution still being deprecated in 2508 release? When I search on "Perform Valuation" apps they don't indicate in the app title they are deprecated.

entry.title: Re: Crucial/key Setup needed for the Integration of TM TU-based Integration with SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi Muhammad, 

Thanks for sharing the TU based EWM integration scenario steps. I will go through them and let you know the results. 

Thanks, 

Murali

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification for Partners: An Overview of the Latest Changes - Including Q&A
entry.content:
Hi @GioHC,

Thank you for reaching out. I understand your frustration with the scheduling issue. Based on the limited information I have, it seems you need to retake the exam since your certification has expired and you missed the 'Stay Certified' period. 

  • Stay Certified Process: Normally, if you are within the 'Stay Certified' period, you wouldn't need to book a new exam. Instead, you would just need to complete an assessment through My Learning -> Certification. However, since your certification has already expired, this option is no longer available to you.

  • Support Ticket: Given that your certification has expired and you need to take a new exam, this indeed becomes a matter for SAP Support. Unfortunately, the support team is currently overloaded, but they are committed to addressing all open tickets. I recommend opening a new support ticket and clearly explaining your situation again: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter. Mention that your certification has expired and that you need to schedule a new exam. 

I hope this helps, and I apologize for the inconvenience you're experiencing.

entry.title: Re: Merging Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Quick question...I would like to do the same in my Build Work Zone - Standard Edition..where I am building tiles which expose external URL cloud systems with my client.

For example, only a few group going to ServiceNow..and others to external procurement tools etc. I want all those within a "Home" Space, but control the access via Merge ID.

entry.title: Free of charge samples sales for Brazil with NFE
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a new requirement from our Brazil client to implement Free of charge scenario.

We have implemented a custom solution already, but the customer master needs to be set up in a particular way so that the system can determine the tax values correctly. 

Now they are looking for a free of charge sales which can be applied to all customers. It should have a NFE generated, and net value = zero, but ICMS should be determined.

Could you please guide me on this? Is there a configuration setup which is provided in standard SAP which I can use?

Thanks,
Vishnu

entry.title: Re: Business Partner as leading object in ECC
entry.content: It is possible to use Business Partner (BP) as the leading object in ECC, but it's typically not the standard approach. The BP is usually activated as a prerequisite for conversion to S/4HANA, while customer/supplier remains the leading object in ECC. Using BP as the leading object in ECC may require additional configuration and could have implications on data management and processes. It’s important to consult with your SAP team or check relevant documentation to understand any potential system impacts.

entry.title: Re: Completion of third party sales orders
entry.content: FYI - I had raised this to SAP, and they provided a note 127514 to correct FKREL for existing documents.

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning with Datasphere & SAC: Seamless Planning in the Cloud?
entry.content:
@Cocquerel Currently, Seamless Planning only generates tables in Datasphere based on the SAC Planning Model with respective presistence mode.

These tables can be used in other Datasphere artefacts.

Future releases will support creating SAC Planning Models based on Datasphere Analytic Models; Details are not yet known.

Hope this answers your question?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification for Partners: An Overview of the Latest Changes - Including Q&A
entry.content:
Hello @Ruchindra,

Thank you for reaching out and sorry for this experience. I must admit that it is very difficult to offer help without knowing the whole context and/or technical background - but I will try.

It seems that there might be a problem with your subscription or the activation of your certification attempts. This could be due to a technical issue or a problem with your subscription. I suggest reaching out to the SAP Learning Help Center (the colleagues are currently overloaded but will address every open ticket) and explaining the situation in detail: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter. Unfortunately, I cannot speed up the process of the ticket from my side.

Additionally, @Vitaly_Toraman mentioned a workaround (thank you for that!) - did you try that already?

entry.title: Re: Firebase Authentication Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi

The launch of Firebase Studio (and merging the IDX with it) may have changed things at their end, may be.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification for Partners: An Overview of the Latest Changes - Including Q&A
entry.content: Yes I already tried that out and it works!

entry.title: Re: e-learning courses "course home"
entry.content:
I don't think these are configurable.

We work around these issues by putting one Content Object into one Item, and using prerequisites to enforce order, and curriculua to assign the learning to users.

This also has the benefit, if you are using the Library to allow users to search for learning, that each topic (Content Object) is easier to find.

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning with Datasphere & SAC: Seamless Planning in the Cloud?
entry.content: @dirkfrick Thanks for your answer. So, I understand it is not possible today but will be possible in the future via Datasphere Analytic model that may rely on virtual remote tables.

entry.title: Re: Connect & Exchange Corner on SAP Learning Hub, student edition
entry.content: Hi @MiSu , please keep in mind that the verification process might take a little while. After a lecturer fills out a brief form to verify their profile, they will receive an email confirmation within one business day. Could you please specify the support you need?

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me: Generative AI Solutioning for Support Knowledge Search
entry.content: @ErikEbertDK :: We are now targeting a May 15th soft release for about 25% of search sessions, and May 27th for a full release to all search sessions (assuming the soft launch goes smoothly)! The solution is ready to put live right now (and the internal UAT results are very much tempting us to do so), but we want to do a few final optimizations on the backend and put a little UX polish on the design for ya first.

entry.title: Link service contract item to Service Contract template in a solution order
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

Is there a possibility to refer to previously created service contract templates when entering a Service contract item in a solution order.
Comparable to the functionality: Service Contract Determination/Contract assignment, which exists if you enter a service product in a solution order. 


Thank you 

Best regards

HC

entry.title: Re: i_journalentrytp - RAP Action
entry.content: Hi , Were you able to use i_journalentrytp in an ACTION? I checked the link posted but the execution occurs in a DETERMINATION. I would also like to use this BO in my Action but a "DUMP" error occurs. TKS

entry.title: Performance Objectives - Story reporting
entry.content:
Dear all, 

The question involves elements of both RBP and Story reporting. A performance objective is an agreement between the employee and their manager. However, our Center of Excellence (CoE) wants to monitor whether each employee has set their objectives. Using RBP, we can access the objective form, but this opens the content of the objectives. In the story report, I exclude the descriptions and focus only on the high-level counts (Objectives ID/Status). 

Can we report only on the objective IDs and statuses, without exposing the full objective content? 

Thanks

Mirjam

entry.title: Re: ITSMobile Table Control(Element)
entry.content:
Hi,

we had the same problem after upgrading from ECC to S4 HANA 2023. We solved with a workaround that seems to be working:

  • in the screen with the table control, we shrinked the table to the minimum height and moved it to the bottom of the screen: the table will not be used for display, it needs to be there for a correct syntax
  • in place of the table, we added a dummy container "CONT" assigning it the former size of the shrinked table

With these two steps, the application works again without further action

entry.title: Re: SLD is not starting because of certificate
entry.content: Link to guide is dead, see SAP Note 3369379 Instead.

entry.title: Re: Seamless Planning with Datasphere & SAC: Seamless Planning in the Cloud?
entry.content: I guess yes, but I think we need to wait whether there will be any restrictions, @Cocquerel

entry.title: Re: Downloads link in course accelerate-enterprise-integr...
entry.content: @SumitKunduI'm glad to let you know the problem is fixed. 404 errors shouldn't occur anymore when you try to download the hands-on material.

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content: I forgot to say that you should record again CU50, but with the option "Simulate Background Mode" selected, this way you'll run CU50 with SY-BATCH = X. If it doesn't do a short dump, use the recorded BDCDATA in your program. Concerning the screen you show, you are saying that you're interested by the data below the screen SAPLCKDI 4623, which is in the subscreen area DATA_EXT_S, the Debugger Screen Analysis doesn't show it (SAPLSEXM 0200 = empty screen). Run Screen Analysis again after the subscreen inside DATA_EXT_S is shown. Note that this screen is managed by an implementation of BAdI DYNPRO_EXTENSION_CK.

entry.title: SAP Group Reporting - Consolidation Frequency Yearly
entry.content:
Dear expert,

I set the consolidation frequency as Yearly

Why does the system allow me to select individual months in Data Monitor?
Is this correct?
In addition, can you confirm that after setting yearly conso frequency and running release universal journal the system is loading full year YTD in ACDOCU?

Thanks in advance.
Gianluca

SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Application OData Service writing back to S/4
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAC Story/App, I have the possibility to write back to S/4 (On Premise) to trigger transactional actions in the S/4 system (see help Use an OData Service in Analytics Designer or Optimized Story Experience | SAP Help Portal). My question is, is it possible to write back data from SAC also into a Z-Table in S/4? I would like to write back text data to create a commenting solution. In SAC App we have the function ODataService1.executeActions(). Is it possible through that?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Is it possible to default a rating against the goals under specific goal category
entry.content:
We have a requirement wherein the goals listed under a specific goal category in the Performance form should have an auto -populated rating which cannot be edited by the employee or manager.

Can you please confirm if its possible to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Re: Posting only possible in periods 2025/12 and 2025/11...
entry.content: I'm afraid the note won't work as the periods are already shifted X+8 i.e. December opened in April.

entry.title: Re: About scope items for material closing period(MMPV)
entry.content:
Dear ki2003,

The material closing period (MMPV) function in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has undergone some changes:

  1. The scope item BEI has been deprecated starting from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.

  2. The substitute for the scope item BEI is the 3F0.  SAP recommends switching from BEI to 3F0 by the end of year 2025.

  3. The "Close Periods" app, which is part of the MMPV function, is now included in the master data management capabilities for products/materials.

The above information you can find in the following link: SAP Help Portal - Event-Based (3F0) versus Period-Based (BEI) in Production Costs of Manufacturing Orders 

I hope it can help you!

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Posting only possible in periods 2025/12 and 2025/11...
entry.content:
Hello @Sridevi51 

The only way I'm aware of to shift periods back is the one described here: SAP MM Period Opening Withdrawal It worked for me then, when I wrote the article. I don't know if it still works - probably. So no guarantees here.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Batch-specific / -neutral available quantity in storage type when picking for supply to producit
entry.content:
Hello castin,
Can you please help me to understand your process and setup better?
What was your original issue and what is different with the storage type being set to Avail. Qt. Batches = batch-neutral? With batch-neutral the created WT normally contains no batch information (as the available stock contains no batch). Or did you model this differently?
Thanks, Tobias

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to get completions by completionDate for all users using the APIs?
entry.content: Is there any updated solution for this. if not can you share the new link for Learning data services, as that is not working
